_comment: Remote ad configuration, written to Firestore config/ads by `npm run sync`. Every field is optional in the app (a missing field falls back to the in-app default, which mirrors this file). 0 disables an interstitial trigger or native placement. adsEnabled is the global kill-switch. reward.unlockPremium / reward.download are per-catalog watch-to-unlock switches: setting one to false makes that content FREE, never unavailable.
